title: Media enquiries
body: "Media can contact the Ofsted press office on 03000 130 415 between 8:30am and 6pm Monday to Friday. Alternatively you can email your enquiry to pressenquiries@ofsted.gov.uk.  Out of these hours, during evenings and weekends, the duty press officer can be reached on 07919 057 359. Please note, text messages to this number will not be received.  Please note that if you are not a member of the media you should call the Ofsted helpline on 0300 123 1231 or email enquiries@ofsted.gov.uk.  Contacts  Media enquiry line: 03000 130 415 (8:30am to 6pm Monday to Friday)  Head of media  Úna Flynn  Telephone: 03000 131 846  Email: Una.Flynn@ofsted.gov.uk  Senior media officers  Charlotte Peet Telephone: 03000 130 049 Email: Charlotte.Peet@ofsted.gov.uk  Hannah Simpson Telephone: 03330 777 509 Email: Hannah.Simpson@ofsted.gov.uk  Media officer  Jessica Baird Telephone: 03000 131 934 Email: Jessica.Baird@ofsted.gov.uk  "
